# Gentle Forest Assets

Source: https://seliel-the-shaper.itch.io/gentle-forest
Uploaded source pack: `19.07a - Gentle Forest 3.0a ($0 palettes)-41904b67e491.zip`
Creator: Seliel the Shaper
License: Mana Seed User License: https://selieltheshaper.weebly.com/user-license.html

Used in this game:
- Preview/page art from the source page.
- Full free tilesheets from the uploaded $0 palette pack.
- Waterfall, water sparkle, tree-wall, and actual sample-map assets from the uploaded pack.

Only used inside this game project. Do not redistribute these files as a standalone asset pack.
